# 2. Logging in to self-service automation portal
## 2.3. Synchronizing auto-generated templates




The auto-generated self-service templates are synchronized from the job templates in Ansible Automation Platform to self-service automation portal. You can manually trigger a sync from the **Templates** page.

Note
This synchronization fetches updates for auto-generated self-service templates only.



**Procedure**

1. In a browser, sign in to self-service automation portal.
1. In the navigation pane, select **Templates** to display the templates that you have access to.

![Templates view](https://access.redhat.com/webassets/avalon/d/Red_Hat_Ansible_Automation_Platform-2.6-Using_self-service_automation_portal-en-US/images/6e9369727e78fce7f01d809246d32a82/self-service-templates-view.png)



1. Select **Sync now** to launch a synchronization.
